title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Vedvyas Finance Private Limited, Odisha
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated March 16, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand Only) on Vedvyas Finance Private Limited, Odisha (Company) for non-compliance with certain -directions issued by RBI on ‘Governance’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under Section 58G(1)(b) read with Section 58B(5)(aa) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
